title: Network guard missing from chat wallet-load path
description: nie --network mainnet chat with a testnet wallet.json present: chat() calls try_load_wallet_fvks() without calling check_network_guard() first. Testnet FVKs are loaded and testnet Unified Addresses are derived and shown to the user (via /receive) as if they are mainnet addresses. User pastes the address to a mainnet block explorer or sends real ZEC to it — funds are unrecoverable. Guard exists and is called in wallet init and wallet restore but not in chat. Fix: call check_network_guard() in chat() before try_load_wallet_fvks().
close_reason: Fixed: added network: &str param to chat(), call check_network_guard(data_dir, network)? before try_load_wallet_fvks(). Updated main.rs call site to pass &cli.network. Tests pass.
